narrative: Middle East escalation drives risk-off flows as a drone strike on a UAE nuclear plant deepens the Iran conflict—USD/JPY at 158.92; gold lower -0.59%; equities -1.24%; DXY +0.06%; VIX 18.4. USD/AUD bilateral divergence dominates G8 themes (spread 1.484%) as USD (+0.579%, n=7) outperforms AUD (-0.904%, n=4) on risk-premium demand and a 60bp Fed-RBA carry disadvantage. USD/JPY options show a strong -1.73 RR put skew, signaling heavy downside hedging despite the -60bp carry bid. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision May 27.
